clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall produce [VIDEOS_PER_PERIOD] social media videos per [BILLING_PERIOD] for [PLATFORM_LIST], as described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED].
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [DELIVERY_DATE] at , subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.

This Agreement renews automatically for successive [BILLING_PERIOD] periods unless either Party gives written notice of non-renewal at least [RENEWAL_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days before the end of the current period.
The Client may request delivery within [RUSH_DELIVERY_PERIOD_DAYS] days, in exchange for an additional fee of [RUSH_DELIVERY_FEE].
Video requests beyond [VIDEOS_PER_PERIOD] in a given [BILLING_PERIOD] shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_VIDEO_PRICE] per video.
The Client shall reimburse the Service Provider's reasonable, pre-approved travel expenses in addition to [TOTAL_VALUE].

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.
The Client shall review each video within [APPROVAL_PERIOD_DAYS] days of delivery. If the Client does not respond within this period, the video shall be deemed approved.
The Client may request up to [INCLUDED_REVISION_ROUNDS] rounds of revisions per video at no additional charge. Additional rounds shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_REVISION_FEE] per round.

Upon full payment, the Client receives a license to use the Deliverables on [PLATFORM_LIST]. Use in paid advertising or on channels outside [PLATFORM_LIST] requires an additional license fee of [EXTENDED_USAGE_FEE].
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.

The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE]. Ambiguity: none — renewal explicitly requires affirmative non-renewal notice rather than leaving continuation implied, addressing Step 2 risk #1 directly (contrasting with a silent-renewal default, which PLDS-001 §9/§10 discourages). Duplication: Extra Videos vs. Revisions kept distinct — the former addresses quantity beyond the batch, the latter addresses iteration on an already-requested video. Loophole closed: Commercial Usage explicitly scoped to [PLATFORM_LIST] by default, requiring an extension fee for paid advertising use, closing a gap where "sharing on social media" could otherwise be read to include unrestricted ad usage. Contradiction: none. Missing protection: Approval Process deemed-approval mechanism added to prevent unlimited-duration review delays given the retainer/high-volume nature of this Contract Type. Complexity: reused Rush Delivery pattern from Corporate/Commercial Video for consistency. Enforceability: renewal, extra-video, and revision terms all tied to explicit Dynamic Fields. Attack: Provider treats the Agreement as automatically continuing forever with no way for Client to exit — mitigated: renewal requires explicit non-renewal notice with a defined lead time, and either Party may issue it. Attack: Client requests double the agreed video volume in one period, expecting it within the base fee — mitigated by Extra Videos Clause pricing per additional video. Attack: Client uses videos originally scoped for organic social posting in a paid ad campaign without upgrading — mitigated by Commercial Usage's explicit platform-list default and required extension fee. No further gaps found. Version 1.0.0 — Self-Review and Red Team passed — Pending Human Legal Review.
